name: qui-client
description: Qwik UI CLI (qui): init, connect, add, update — plus default component sources in this repo under components/

scripts.test: node --test test/parser.test.js test/config.test.js test/policy.test.js test/source-resolver.test.js test/component-catalog.test.js test/cli-demo-smoke.test.js test/init-smoke.test.js test/connect-smoke.test.js
scripts.qui:createdemo:
node ./bin/qui.js init demo && (cd demo && node ../bin/qui.js add --all base --force && node ../bin/qui.js generate-demo) && echo "
Demo created. Run:\ncd demo\nnpm run dev"
scripts.qui:addtest: cd demo && node ../bin/qui.js connect --repo componenttest --url file://../componenttest --uilibs qui-test-simple,qui-test-layout,qui-test-complex,qui-test-html-tags && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-simple && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-layout && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-complex && node ../bin/qui.js add --repo componenttest --all qui-test-html-tags
